package rulefixtures

import (
	"crypto/md5"
)

// scenario for weak_crypto: Direct use of weak standard-library crypto packages such as crypto/md5, crypto/sha1, crypto/des, and crypto/rc4.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: security; severity: warning.
func scenario745Positive(payload []byte) []byte {
	sum := md5.Sum(payload)
	return sum[:]
}
